name: Single Impact Rule
description: Auto-approve PO Revisions where the absolute value of the single revision impact is below the threshold.

name: Cumulative Impact Rule
description: Auto-approve PO Revisions where the cumulative absolute impact of all approved revisions plus the current one is below the threshold.

name: Rate Change Rule
description: Block auto-approval if any Revised or Replace item has a different rate from the original. Threshold is not used for this rule.
